goal: Open Chrome and search for Gemini Live Agent Challenge

steps.description: Double-click the 'Google Chrome' icon on the desktop.
steps.expected_result: The Google Chrome browser window will open.

steps.description: Type 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge' into the address bar or search bar within the Chrome browser.
steps.expected_result: The text 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge' will appear in the Chrome search/address bar.
Chrome will display the search results page for 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge'.

correction_history.reason: Initial attempt failed: The AFTER screenshot shows a desktop with a Windows PowerShell window open. There is no Google Chrome browser window visible on the screen. The PowerShell log explicitly states: 'The Google Chrome browser window is not visible on the screen. Only the Google Chrome desktop icon is present. The PowerShell log indicates a double-click action was performed on the Chrome icon, but the browser window itself is not open.'

Tier-1 failed — tried alternative: The AFTER screenshot shows a desktop with a Windows PowerShell window open. There is no Google Chrome browser window visible on the screen. The PowerShell log explicitly states: 'The Google Chrome browser window is not visible on the screen. Only the Google Chrome desktop icon is present. The PowerShell log indicates a double-click action was performed on the Chrome icon, but the browser window itself is not open.'
Initial attempt failed: The Chrome search/address bar contains the placeholder text 'Search Google or type a URL'. The text 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge' is not visible.
Tier-1 failed — tried alternative: The Chrome search/address bar displays "Search Google or type a URL", not "Gemini Live Agent Challenge".
Tier-2 failed — required user assist: The Chrome search/address bar displays the URL 'google.com/search?q=Gemini+Live+Agent+Challenge...', which contains the text 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge'.
